title_en: Mastering Diverse Domains through World Models
title_zh: 通过世界模型掌握多样领域
abstract_en: DreamerV3 shows general reinforcement learning from learned latent world models.
abstract_zh: DreamerV3 展示了基于学习到的潜在世界模型的通用强化学习能力。
editorial_summary_zh: 潜在世界模型用于决策与控制的经典代表。
why_it_matters: It demonstrates that compact latent world models can support strong generalist control.
